title: NY AG Investigates Compass After It Became Too Big
script: Compass just absorbed Anywhere Real Estate in a $1.6 billion deal, growing overnight from 40,000 agents to more than 200,000 — making it the largest residential brokerage in US history. Now the New York Attorney General is probing whether that deal was too good. Investigators from Letitia James' antitrust bureau have been calling rival brokerages asking for documents. Compass shares tanked more than 12 percent on the news. No charges filed yet.
